description_long: This object is a classic assault rifle with a distinctive wooden stock and foregrip, paired with a matte black metal receiver and barrel. The rifle features a curved detachable magazine, typical of the AK-47 family, and a prominent front sight post. The wooden components have a reddish-brown hue, contrasting with the dark metallic finish of the rest of the firearm. The barrel is long and slender, ending in a simple muzzle with no visible attachments. The trigger and trigger guard are clearly defined, and the overall design is robust and utilitarian, suitable for rugged urban environments. The rifle's iron sights are integrated into the top of the receiver and barrel.
description: A classic assault rifle with a wooden stock and foregrip, black metal receiver, and curved magazine. Features iron sights and a long, slender barrel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow profile of the barrel and front sight post.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wooden stock, curved magazine, and full length of the barrel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the slim stock and alignment of the receiver.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the magazine, trigger, and wooden components.
